headline: BASF Expands Specialty Emollients Capacity With New Dusseldorf Plant
summary: BASF opens a new Dusseldorf specialty emollients plant to meet rising global demand for skin care and sun protection ingredients.

raw.headline: BASF Expands Specialty Emollients Capacity With New Dusseldorf Plant
raw.summary: BASF opens a new Dusseldorf specialty emollients plant to meet rising global demand for skin care and sun protection ingredients.

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on Albemarle, Lowers Price Target to $245
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Peter Osterland   maintains Albemarle (NYSE:ALB) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $260 to $245.
